title: rosa omissa subvar. gillotii
intro: Rosa omissa subvar. gillotii, also known as the Gillot rose, is a rare and lesser-known variant of Rosa omissa, a species of wild rose. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Rosa omissa subvar. gillotii include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, and are often used in traditional herbal medicine to support overall health and well-being.
